chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5470 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.22736/2017 2. For hearing of main case 27.01.2025 Mr. Umer Akhund, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly submitted that the department may finalize the assessment in accordance with law after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, however, pending such adjudication no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. By consent, this petition is disposed off in the above terms. Judge Judge Amjad
